description: GPU architecture backend configuration. Entries are matched against detected GPU names. First matching entry wins. Patterns use case-insensitive substring matching.

gpu_backends.name: AMD RDNA 3.5 (Strix Point APU)
gpu_backends.notes: ROCm/HIP crashes on gfx1150/gfx1151 (Strix Point) due to unsupported ops in libamdhip64

gpu_backends.name: AMD RDNA 4
gpu_backends.notes: RDNA 4 — ROCm support varies; Vulkan is generally more stable

gpu_backends.name: AMD RDNA 3 (Discrete)
gpu_backends.notes: RDNA 3 discrete GPUs — ROCm well supported

gpu_backends.name: NVIDIA (CUDA)
gpu_backends.notes: NVIDIA GPUs — prefer CUDA over Vulkan
